name: @jeldon/amplify
description: Domain-agnostic content amplification. generateKit() produces per-channel distribution copy (GBP/FB/IG/LinkedIn/newsletter/podcast) + IG carousels, one BrevoClient {createScheduledCampaign, cancel, sendNow, nextSendSlot} collapsing the triple Brevo helpers, and carousel-sidecar persistence via @jeldon/store. Every prompt/channel/scheme is read from pack.voice + pack.amplify — nothing about any vertical is hardcoded. Ported from Body of Health amplify/carousel/newsletter endpoints + brevo-campaigns.ts + brevo-config.ts + auto-newsletter.mjs.
